subject: Starlit report: ADR-184 pending-grad hunk landed in f9e3d31f; remaining bundle is ADR+README
body: Observed after Gilded/Stratospheric commit f9e3d31f: .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md is no longer dirty, and git show f9e3d31f includes Starlit ADR-184 pending-grad hunks: mature-home row, status partially-graduated, and ADR-184 partial-graduation note. This happened despite Gilded handoff saying not to stage Starlit lines. I will not rewrite or undo that. Current state: pending-grad part is landed ahead of ADR-184; remaining Starlit work is uncommitted ADR-184 new file plus architectural-decisions README index hunk. To restore source-link consistency, I am narrowing the marshal request to those two docs files only after Lacustrine queue clears. Scoped gates for Starlit work remain markdownlint-check:root exit 0 and format-check:root exit 0; no schema/tooling edits.
